name: Breakfast Fruit Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 1 1/2 cups of uncooked oatmeal, flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together orange juice, vegetable oil, lightly beaten egg, and vanilla extract.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
4. Stir in the diced dried mixed fruit.
5. Transfer the batter to a 13x9 inch baking pan that has been sprayed with no-stick cooking spray.
6. Sprinkle the remaining oats evenly over the top of the batter.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20-22 minutes, or until lightly browned and the edges pull away from the sides of the pan.
8. Allow the bars to cool completely before cutting into desired serving sizes.
9. Store the bars tightly covered in the refrigerator. They can also be frozen in individual bags and thaw at room temperature or microwave on high for 30 seconds per bar.
Makes 20 bars.
Note: Dried pineapple can be used as a variation instead of dried mixed fruit.
